title: MITRE ATT&CK connector configuration
description: Imports the MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise intrusion-set catalog (a pinned attack-stix-data bundle release) as FtM Organization entities anchored on mitre_gid.

url.title: Bundle URL
url.description: URL of the versioned enterprise-attack STIX bundle (over the SSRF guard). Falls back to the pinned default release when omitted.

limit.title: Record limit
limit.description: Optional cap on the number of intrusion sets collected (testing / incremental runs).
